## markdown-it-wikilinks package

Contained Node filesystem adapter for wikilink frontmatter tooltips.

## Classes

<table><thead><tr><th>

Class


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[AmbiguousTooltipTargetError](./markdown-it-wikilinks.ambiguoustooltiptargeterror.md)


</td><td>

Thrown when a basename or case-insensitive path maps to multiple files.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[DisposedTooltipResolverError](./markdown-it-wikilinks.disposedtooltipresolvererror.md)


</td><td>

Thrown after a resolver has been disposed.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[TooltipContainmentError](./markdown-it-wikilinks.tooltipcontainmenterror.md)


</td><td>

Thrown when a requested tooltip path escapes the declared content root.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

## Functions

<table><thead><tr><th>

Function


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[createFrontmatterTooltipResolver(options)](./markdown-it-wikilinks.createfrontmattertooltipresolver.md)


</td><td>

Creates a contained, refreshable frontmatter tooltip resolver.

Symlinks are rejected by default. When enabled, every followed real path must remain inside the real content root. Missing targets return `undefined`<!-- -->; ambiguous targets and malformed frontmatter throw.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
